decision_detail: Moved to values chapter canonical location.
reason_why: Value is a foundational concept owned by the Values chapter, and this relocation keeps the definition aligned with conceptual ownership while reducing duplicate or context-specific definitions elsewhere in the specification text.

decision_detail: Moved to conceptual type-layout owner section for the size definition.
reason_why: Type layout is the canonical location where size semantics are defined and compared, so retaining this term there keeps definition ownership coherent and avoids duplicative local definitions in unrelated contexts.
